summary: Iteration 39 - Testing Player Performance Integration in Pre-Match Prediction. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed homepage loads with 70 matches showing Playing XI predictions, and PreMatch page displays correctly with Combined Prediction, Algorithm (8 categories), and Claude Opus analysis sections.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Health check returns squadsLoaded=true, scheduleLoaded=true (version 4.1.0)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns prediction with all 8 categories having non-zero weights
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns form data with top_performers array (player performance)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns playing_xi with source field and team1_xi/team2_xi
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns has_player_stats flag in form data
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict (without force) - Returns cached prediction correctly
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_016/pre-match-predict?force=true - RR vs RCB prediction works (Team1 55.6% vs Team2 44.4%)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/fetch-live - Returns gracefully with noLiveMatch:true (no live match currently)
POST /api/sync-player-stats - Returns sync_started status (background sync initiated)
All 8 prediction categories have non-zero weights summing to 1.0

frontend_verification.homepage_loads: VERIFIED - 70 matches displayed with predictions and Playing XI labels
frontend_verification.match_cards_show_playing_xi: VERIFIED - Cards show 'Playing XI: Predicted -11 + 10/11 players'
frontend_verification.match_cards_show_predictions: VERIFIED - Cards show prediction percentages (e.g., RR 56% vs RCB 44%)
frontend_verification.prematch_page_loads: VERIFIED - RR vs RCB (ipl2026_016) page loads correctly
frontend_verification.combined_prediction_section: VERIFIED - Shows RR 55.3% vs RCB 44.7% with HIGH CONSENSUS
frontend_verification.algorithm_section: VERIFIED - Algorithm (5-factor logistic model) shows RR 55.6% vs RCB 44.4%
frontend_verification.claude_opus_section: VERIFIED - Claude Opus AI narrative analysis shows RR 55% vs RCB 45%
frontend_verification.factor_breakdown_8_categories: VERIFIED - Shows Squad Strength (25%), Current Form (21%), Venue+Pitch+Home (18%), H2H (11%)
frontend_verification.match_info_panel: VERIFIED - Shows Match #16, T20, TATA IPL 2026, Status: Upcoming, City: Guwahati
frontend_verification.team_comparison_radar: VERIFIED - Radar chart showing Form, H2H, Venue, Bowling, Batting, NRR

critical_code_review_comments: sportmonks_service.py correctly implements fetch_team_recent_performance() with team_id filtering to avoid mixing opponent stats
form_service.py fetch_team_form() now combines W/L form (60%) + player performance form (40%) when player_performance data is available
pre_match_predictor.py compute_prediction() dynamically overrides STAR_PLAYERS ratings based on actual player stats from SportMonks
All 8 prediction categories (squad_strength, current_form, venue_pitch_home, h2h, toss_impact, bowling_depth, conditions, momentum) have non-zero weights
Playing XI fetching pipeline: live fixtures -> last completed match -> squad estimate fallback
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 complete. Player performance integration verified: (1) Pre-match predict with force=true returns form data with top_performers array containing player-level batting/bowling stats, (2) has_player_stats flag indicates whether player performance data was used, (3) All 8 prediction categories have non-zero weights summing to 1.0, (4) fetch-live returns noLiveMatch:true gracefully when no live match, (5) sync-player-stats starts background sync. Frontend shows 70 matches with Playing XI predictions and 8-category factor breakdown.

player_performance_in_form.description: Form data includes top_performers array with player-level batting/bowling stats from SportMonks

8_category_weights.description: All 8 categories (squad_strength 25%, current_form 21%, venue_pitch_home 18%, h2h 11%, toss_impact 9%, bowling_depth 8%, conditions 5%, momentum 3%) have non-zero weights

playing_xi_source.description: playing_xi includes source field ('live', 'last_match', 'squad_estimate') and team1_xi/team2_xi arrays

fetch_live_graceful.description: fetch-live returns noLiveMatch:true gracefully when no live IPL match is in progress

sync_player_stats.description: sync-player-stats endpoint starts background sync and returns sync_started status

frontend_predictions.description: Homepage shows 70 matches with predictions, Playing XI labels, and model confidence indicators

prematch_page.description: PreMatch page shows Combined Prediction, Algorithm (8 categories), Claude Opus analysis, and Team Comparison radar
